description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent gable roof and a modest front porch. The facade includes a combination of large and small rectangular windows, with a distinct blue accent wall section near the attached garage. The property is bordered by a low fence and includes a paved driveway leading to the garage. A mature tree and some shrubbery are present on the left side, adding greenery to the front yard. The rear of the bungalow is simpler, with a long row of windows and a back patio area. The overall design is compact and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, front porch, attached garage, and a mix of large and small windows, surrounded by a low fence and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, main entrance, blue accent wall, garage, and a tree on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the long row of windows, chimney, and driveway with landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simple facade with a back patio and minimal window arrangement.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side windows, sloped roof, and additional landscaping near the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
